patches.value: 阿里云与腾讯云的只读身份、角色、实例和对象存储边界检查命令，使用独立实验 Profile 并保留云审计日志。
Read-only identity, role, instance, and object-storage boundary checks for Alibaba Cloud and Tencent Cloud using dedicated lab profiles with cloud audit logs retained.

name.en: Confirm an Alibaba Cloud Lab Identity

value.command:
aliyun configure --profile payloader-lab
aliyun --profile payloader-lab sts GetCallerIdentity

description.zh: 创建专用实验 Profile 后查询当前调用身份，先记录账号、主体和会话边界再执行任何资源清单。
description.en: Create a dedicated lab profile and query the current caller identity before any resource inventory, recording the account, principal, and session boundary.

name.zh: 阿里云实例与角色清单
name.en: Inventory Alibaba Cloud Instances and Roles

value.command:
aliyun --profile payloader-lab ecs DescribeInstances --RegionId cn-hangzhou
aliyun --profile payloader-lab ram ListRoles

description.zh: 只读列出实验区域实例和 RAM 角色，用实例归属与角色信任策略核对最小权限，不访问实例元数据端点。
description.en: Read instances and RAM roles in the lab region to review ownership and trust boundaries without contacting an instance-metadata endpoint.

name.en: Confirm a Tencent Cloud Lab Identity

value.command:
tccli configure --profile payloader-lab
tccli sts GetCallerIdentity --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 使用专用腾讯云 Profile 确认当前账号和主体，避免在命令行保存长期密钥或复用生产配置。
description.en: Confirm the current account and principal through a dedicated Tencent Cloud profile without placing long-lived keys on the command line or reusing production configuration.

name.zh: 腾讯云角色与实例清单
name.en: Inventory Tencent Cloud Roles and Instances

value.command:
tccli cam ListRoles --profile payloader-lab
tccli cvm DescribeInstances --region ap-guangzhou --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 只读列出实验账号角色与指定区域 CVM 实例，并用 CloudAudit 事件关联查询身份和时间窗口。
description.en: Read roles and CVM instances in the selected lab region and correlate the inventory with CloudAudit identity and timestamps.

value.command:
ossutil ls oss://payloader-lab-bucket
ossutil stat oss://payloader-lab-bucket/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt

description.zh: 仅列出自有实验 Bucket 并读取固定 marker 的对象元数据，不下载对象内容、不测试第三方 Bucket 或匿名访问。
description.en: List only an owned lab bucket and read metadata for a fixed marker object without downloading content, testing third-party buckets, or attempting anonymous access.

patches.value: AWS 高级权限边界审计
Advanced AWS Authorization-Boundary Audit
AWS IAM、S3、Lambda 与 CloudTrail 的高级只读审计命令，核对授权路径、资源策略、函数角色和日志连续性。
Advanced read-only AWS audit commands for IAM, S3, Lambda, and CloudTrail authorization paths, resource policies, function roles, and logging continuity.

value.command:
aws sts get-caller-identity --profile payloader-lab
aws iam get-account-summary --profile payloader-lab
aws iam list-roles --max-items 20 --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 确认调用主体并限量读取账号摘要和角色清单，用于识别异常信任关系而不创建用户、密钥或策略绑定。
description.en: Confirm the caller and read a bounded account summary and role inventory to identify unusual trust relationships without creating users, keys, or policy attachments.

name.en: Inspect S3 Policy and Object Inventory

value.command:
aws s3api get-bucket-policy-status --bucket payloader-lab-bucket --profile payloader-lab
aws s3api list-objects-v2 --bucket payloader-lab-bucket --max-keys 20 --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 对自有实验 Bucket 读取公开策略状态和最多二十个对象键，不复制对象、不递归同步也不访问第三方存储。
description.en: Read public-policy status and at most twenty object keys from an owned lab bucket without copying objects, recursively syncing data, or contacting third-party storage.

value.command:
aws lambda list-functions --max-items 20 --profile payloader-lab
aws lambda get-policy --function-name PAYLOADER_LAB_FUNCTION --profile payloader-lab
aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name PAYLOADER_LAB_FUNCTION --query '{FunctionName:FunctionName,Runtime:Runtime,Role:Role,Timeout:Timeout,TracingConfig:TracingConfig}' --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 限量列出函数并读取指定实验函数的资源策略和非敏感运行配置，明确排除环境变量值和函数调用。
description.en: List a bounded set of functions and inspect one lab function's resource policy and non-sensitive runtime configuration while excluding environment-variable values and invocation.

name.zh: CloudTrail 与访问密钥连续性

value.command:
aws cloudtrail describe-trails --include-shadow-trails --profile payloader-lab
aws cloudtrail get-trail-status --name PAYLOADER_LAB_TRAIL --profile payloader-lab
aws iam list-access-keys --user-name PAYLOADER_LAB_USER --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 只读核对 Trail 状态和实验用户密钥元数据，记录停止记录时间与密钥年龄，不删除 Trail 或创建持久化凭据。
description.en: Read trail status and lab-user access-key metadata to review logging gaps and key age without deleting trails or creating persistence credentials.

patches.value: 多云配置与关系审计工具参考，覆盖 ScoutSuite、CloudSploit、Steampipe、CloudMapper 及已验证的自有域名绑定清单。
Multi-cloud configuration and relationship-audit toolkit covering ScoutSuite, CloudSploit, Steampipe, CloudMapper, and verified owned-domain binding inventories.
scout aws --profile payloader-lab --report-dir ./scoutsuite-report
使用只读实验 Profile 运行 ScoutSuite AWS 采集并写入独立报告目录，执行前核对服务范围、API 成本与 CloudTrail 记录。
Run ScoutSuite AWS collection with a read-only lab profile into a dedicated report directory after reviewing service scope, API cost, and CloudTrail logging.

git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/aquasecurity/cloudsploit.git
cd cloudsploit
npm ci
node index.js --cloud=aws
从官方仓库安装固定工作副本并运行 AWS 配置检查；凭据由实验环境配置提供，不写入仓库或命令参数。
Install a pinned working copy from the official repository and run AWS configuration checks with credentials supplied by the lab environment rather than the repository or command arguments.

steampipe plugin install aws
steampipe query "select name, region, block_public_acls, block_public_policy from aws_s3_bucket" --output json > steampipe-s3.json
安装 AWS 插件后把 S3 公共访问控制字段导出为 JSON，保留查询文本和采集时间用于复核。
Install the AWS plugin and export S3 public-access control fields as JSON, retaining the query and collection time for review.

python cloudmapper.py collect --account payloader-lab
python cloudmapper.py prepare --account payloader-lab
python cloudmapper.py webserver --account payloader-lab
为单一实验账号采集并准备 CloudMapper 关系图，然后仅在本机启动查看服务；报告目录不得公开发布。
Collect and prepare a CloudMapper graph for one lab account and serve it only on the local workstation without publishing the report directory.
软件供应链只读检查工具参考，覆盖 SBOM、依赖漏洞、静态规则和 OWASP Dependency-Check 报告，输出均写入本地工件目录。
Read-only software supply-chain inspection reference for SBOMs, dependency vulnerabilities, static rules, and OWASP Dependency-Check reports written to local artifact directories.

name.zh: 生成 SPDX 与 CycloneDX SBOM

value.command:
syft dir:. -o spdx-json=./artifacts/sbom.spdx.json
syft myapp:lab -o cyclonedx-json=./artifacts/sbom.cdx.json

description.zh: 分别为当前源码目录和本地实验镜像生成 SPDX 与 CycloneDX JSON，并把结果保存在可归档工件目录。
description.en: Generate SPDX and CycloneDX JSON for the current source directory and a local lab image, storing both results in an archivable artifact directory.

name.en: Scan a Directory, Image, and SBOM

value.command:
grype dir:. -o json > ./artifacts/grype-dir.json
grype myapp:lab -o json > ./artifacts/grype-image.json
grype sbom:./artifacts/sbom.spdx.json -o json > ./artifacts/grype-sbom.json

description.zh: 对同一实验项目的目录、镜像和 SBOM 分别扫描并保存 JSON，比较软件包识别差异后再判定漏洞。
description.en: Scan the same lab project as a directory, image, and SBOM, preserve JSON output, and compare package-discovery differences before classifying findings.

value.command: semgrep scan --config p/security-audit --json-output ./artifacts/semgrep.json .

description.zh: 使用可追溯的 security-audit 规则集扫描当前仓库并导出 JSON，后续按代码路径和数据流人工确认。
description.en: Scan the current repository with the traceable security-audit ruleset, export JSON, and manually confirm findings against code paths and data flow.

value.command: dependency-check.sh --project payloader-lab --scan . --format JSON --out ./artifacts/dependency-check

description.zh: 对实验项目依赖生成 JSON 报告，保留 NVD 数据时间、抑制规则和构建清单以便复核误报。
description.en: Generate a JSON dependency report for the lab project and retain NVD data time, suppression rules, and build manifests for false-positive review.

patches.value: AWS 云权限与配置审计
AWS Cloud Authorization and Configuration Audit
AWS CLI 只读审计命令，覆盖 SSO 身份、IAM 策略、S3、EC2 元数据选项和 Lambda 资源策略，不在命令行保存长期密钥。
Read-only AWS CLI audit commands for SSO identity, IAM policies, S3, EC2 metadata options, and Lambda resource policies without storing long-lived keys on the command line.

name.en: Configure and Sign In to Lab SSO

value.command:
aws configure sso --profile payloader-lab
aws sso login --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 为实验账号创建 SSO Profile 并交互登录，避免在环境变量、脚本或命令历史中保存长期访问密钥。
description.en: Create an SSO profile for the lab account and sign in interactively without storing long-lived access keys in environment variables, scripts, or command history.

name.zh: 确认 AWS 调用身份

value.command: aws sts get-caller-identity --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 记录账号、主体 ARN 和会话 UserId，作为后续所有只读清单与 CloudTrail 事件的身份基线。
description.en: Record the account, principal ARN, and session UserId as the identity baseline for later read-only inventories and CloudTrail events.

value.command:
aws iam get-role --role-name PAYLOADER_LAB_ROLE --profile payloader-lab
aws iam list-attached-role-policies --role-name PAYLOADER_LAB_ROLE --profile payloader-lab
aws iam list-role-policies --role-name PAYLOADER_LAB_ROLE --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 读取指定实验角色的信任策略、托管策略和内联策略名称，用于核对授权边界而不修改绑定。
description.en: Read one lab role's trust policy, managed policies, and inline-policy names to review authorization boundaries without changing attachments.

value.command:
aws s3api head-bucket --bucket payloader-lab-bucket --profile payloader-lab
aws s3api get-public-access-block --bucket payloader-lab-bucket --profile payloader-lab
aws s3api list-objects-v2 --bucket payloader-lab-bucket --max-keys 20 --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 只检查自有实验 Bucket 的可达性、公共访问阻断和限量对象键，不复制对象也不执行匿名第三方探测。
description.en: Inspect reachability, public-access blocking, and a bounded object-key list for an owned lab bucket without copying objects or probing third-party buckets anonymously.

name.en: Inventory EC2 Instances and Network Controls

value.command:
aws ec2 describe-instances --query 'Reservations[].Instances[].{InstanceId:InstanceId,State:State.Name,SubnetId:SubnetId,SecurityGroups:SecurityGroups[].GroupId}' --profile payloader-lab
aws ec2 describe-security-groups --max-items 20 --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 只读列出实例状态、子网和安全组关联，并限量读取安全组规则用于核对暴露面。
description.en: Read instance state, subnet, and security-group relationships and a bounded set of group rules for exposure review.

value.command: aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids i-payloader-lab --query 'Reservations[].Instances[].{InstanceId:InstanceId,HttpTokens:MetadataOptions.HttpTokens,HttpEndpoint:MetadataOptions.HttpEndpoint,HopLimit:MetadataOptions.HttpPutResponseHopLimit}' --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 通过控制面读取实验实例的 IMDS Endpoint、Token 要求和跳数限制，不直接请求链路本地元数据服务。
description.en: Read IMDS endpoint, token requirement, and hop-limit settings for a lab instance through the control plane without requesting the link-local metadata service.

name.en: Inspect Lambda Roles and Resource Policies

value.command:
aws lambda list-functions --max-items 20 --profile payloader-lab
aws lambda get-policy --function-name PAYLOADER_LAB_FUNCTION --profile payloader-lab
aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name PAYLOADER_LAB_FUNCTION --query '{FunctionName:FunctionName,Runtime:Runtime,Role:Role,Timeout:Timeout}' --profile payloader-lab

description.zh: 限量列出函数并读取实验函数角色、超时和资源策略，明确排除环境变量、代码下载与函数调用。
description.en: List a bounded set of functions and read one lab function's role, timeout, and resource policy while excluding environment variables, code downloads, and invocation.

patches.value: Azure 云权限与配置审计
Azure Cloud Authorization and Configuration Audit
Azure CLI 与 ROADtools 的只读身份、资源、托管身份和目录关系检查，使用设备登录或实验身份并保留活动日志。
Read-only Azure CLI and ROADtools checks for identities, resources, managed identities, and directory relationships using device sign-in or a lab identity with activity logs retained.

az login --use-device-code
az account set --subscription PAYLOADER_LAB_SUBSCRIPTION
通过设备码登录并固定实验订阅，不把用户密码或 Service Principal Secret 写入命令历史。
Sign in with a device code and select the lab subscription without placing user passwords or service-principal secrets in command history.

az account show --output json
az ad signed-in-user show --output json
记录当前租户、订阅和交互用户对象；若使用非用户主体，则只保留 account show 并按主体类型解释结果。
Record the current tenant, subscription, and interactive user object, omitting the user query for non-user principals and interpreting results by principal type.

az resource list --query '[].{name:name,type:type,group:resourceGroup,location:location}' --output table
az vm list --show-details --output table
az keyvault list --query '[].{name:name,group:resourceGroup,location:location}' --output table
只读列出资源、虚拟机和 Key Vault 元数据，限制输出为名称、类型、资源组和区域，不读取 Secret 内容。
Read resource, virtual-machine, and Key Vault metadata limited to names, types, resource groups, and locations without reading secret values.
托管身份控制面审计
Managed-Identity Control-Plane Audit

az vm identity show --resource-group PAYLOADER_LAB_RG --name PAYLOADER_LAB_VM --output json
az role assignment list --assignee PAYLOADER_LAB_PRINCIPAL_ID --all --output table
通过 Azure 控制面读取实验 VM 托管身份和对应角色分配，不请求实例元数据令牌。
Read the lab VM managed identity and its role assignments through the Azure control plane without requesting an instance-metadata token.

roadrecon auth --device-code
roadrecon gather
roadrecon gui
使用设备码为实验租户采集目录关系并在本机查看 ROADrecon 数据库，测试后删除会话和采集工件。
Use device-code authentication to collect directory relationships for a lab tenant and inspect the ROADrecon database locally, deleting sessions and artifacts afterward.
GCP 云权限与配置审计
GCP Cloud Authorization and Configuration Audit
Google Cloud CLI 只读身份、项目、IAM、实例服务账号和 Cloud Storage 边界检查，使用独立配置并保存 Cloud Audit Logs。
Read-only Google Cloud CLI checks for identities, projects, IAM, instance service accounts, and Cloud Storage boundaries using an isolated configuration with Cloud Audit Logs retained.

name.zh: 创建 GCP 实验配置

value.command:
gcloud config configurations create payloader-lab
gcloud auth login --no-launch-browser
gcloud config set project PAYLOADER_LAB_PROJECT

description.zh: 创建独立 gcloud 配置、交互登录并固定实验项目，避免覆盖默认配置或在命令行传递 Service Account 密钥。
description.en: Create an isolated gcloud configuration, sign in interactively, and select the lab project without overwriting defaults or passing a service-account key on the command line.

value.command:
gcloud projects describe PAYLOADER_LAB_PROJECT
gcloud compute instances list --project PAYLOADER_LAB_PROJECT
gcloud storage buckets list --project PAYLOADER_LAB_PROJECT
gcloud iam service-accounts list --project PAYLOADER_LAB_PROJECT

description.zh: 只读列出实验项目、实例、Bucket 和 Service Account 元数据，并用审计日志关联当前主体与时间窗口。
description.en: Read lab-project, instance, bucket, and service-account metadata and correlate the inventory with the current principal and audit-log timestamps.

value.command:
gcloud projects get-iam-policy PAYLOADER_LAB_PROJECT --format=json > gcp-project-iam.json
gcloud iam service-accounts get-iam-policy PAYLOADER_LAB_SA --format=json > gcp-service-account-iam.json

description.zh: 把项目与实验 Service Account 的 IAM 策略导出为 JSON 快照，比较成员、角色和条件表达式而不修改绑定。
description.en: Export project and lab-service-account IAM policies as JSON snapshots for member, role, and condition comparison without changing bindings.

name.zh: 实例服务账号与 Scope 审计
name.en: Audit Instance Service Accounts and Scopes

value.command: gcloud compute instances describe PAYLOADER_LAB_VM --zone PAYLOADER_LAB_ZONE --format='json(name,serviceAccounts,metadata.items)'

description.zh: 通过控制面读取实验实例的 Service Account、OAuth Scope 和非敏感元数据键，不请求实例元数据令牌。
description.en: Read a lab instance's service account, OAuth scopes, and non-sensitive metadata keys through the control plane without requesting an instance-metadata token.

value.command:
gcloud storage buckets describe gs://payloader-lab-bucket
gcloud storage ls --limit=20 gs://payloader-lab-bucket/**

description.zh: 读取自有实验 Bucket 配置并限量列出对象键，不下载对象、不测试匿名访问或第三方 Bucket。
description.en: Read configuration for an owned lab bucket and list at most twenty object keys without downloading objects or testing anonymous access to third-party buckets.

patches.value: Pacu AWS 实验框架检查
Pacu AWS Lab Framework Inspection
Pacu 的安装、模块清单、会话身份与本地数据检查参考，默认不执行权限提升、持久化、日志修改或数据提取模块。

Pacu installation, module inventory, session-identity, and local-data inspection reference that does not execute privilege-escalation, persistence, log-manipulation, or data-extraction modules by default.

name.zh: 使用 Pipx 安装并查看帮助
name.en: Install with Pipx and Show Help

value.command:
pipx install git+https://github.com/RhinoSecurityLabs/pacu.git
pacu --help

description.zh: 按项目推荐方式隔离安装 Pacu 并先查看命令帮助，不导入凭据或执行任何模块。
description.en: Install Pacu in an isolated environment using the project's recommended Pipx path and inspect command help before importing credentials or running modules.

value.command: pacu --list-modules

description.zh: 只读取当前版本的模块清单，用实际模块名替代旧教程中的猜测名称，不触发云 API。
description.en: Read the module inventory for the installed version, replacing guessed names from old tutorials without invoking cloud APIs.

value.command: pacu --module-name iam__enum_permissions --module-info

description.zh: 查看指定模块的参数、服务和行为说明，不使用 `--exec` 执行模块；模块不存在时以当前清单为准。
description.en: Inspect a module's arguments, services, and behavior without using --exec, deferring to the current module inventory if the example name is unavailable.

value.command: pacu --session payloader-lab --whoami

description.zh: 在已单独配置的实验会话读取当前 AWS 主体，并把输出与 STS 和 CloudTrail 身份基线对照。
description.en: Read the current AWS principal from a separately configured lab session and compare it with the STS and CloudTrail identity baseline.

value.command: pacu --session payloader-lab --data all

description.zh: 只读取 Pacu 本地 SQLAlchemy 会话数据库中已采集的数据，测试后删除会话目录和日志工件。
description.en: Read only data already stored in Pacu's local SQLAlchemy session database and delete the session directory and log artifacts after testing.
